# .github

## Purpose
GitHub-specific configuration. Contains GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow definitions and automated code review.

## Subdirectories

| Directory | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| `workflows/` | CI (lint/test/build), deploy (Docker → GHCR), PR 자동 코드 리뷰 pipelines — see `workflows/AGENTS.md` |
